label: Song
description: Defines a music track played by the in-game music system. The game loads the audio clip from clipPath and selects songs based on map state, time of day, season, and royal title.

clipPath.label: Clip path
clipPath.description: Content path to the Unity AudioClip for this song. The game appends no extension. Not translated.

volume.label: Volume
volume.description: Multiplier applied to the user music volume setting when this song plays. Defaults to 1. Shipped values are not limited to the 0-1 range.

playOnMap.label: Play on map
playOnMap.description: If true, this song is eligible for ordinary map-level music playback. Set to false for songs played only via music sequences.

commonality.label: Commonality
commonality.description: Weighted random selection value controlling how often this song is chosen relative to others. Use 0 to make the song sequence-only so it is never randomly selected.

tense.label: Tense
tense.description: If true, this song is treated as danger music and is eligible for selection during combat or other tense situations.

allowedTimeOfDay.label: Allowed time of day
allowedTimeOfDay.description: Time-of-day constraint controlling when this song is eligible for normal playback. Defaults to Any.

allowedSeasons.label: Allowed seasons
allowedSeasons.description: Seasons during which this song is eligible for normal playback. If empty or omitted, the song is allowed in any season.

minRoyalTitle.label: Min royal title
minRoyalTitle.description: Minimum RoyalTitleDef the pawn must hold for this song to be played. Used to gate prestige music behind Royalty titles.

new-song.label: New song
new-song.description: Standard ambient or tension song with a clip path and basic playback settings.
